mainEntity.name: Process to file workers comp claim in North Salt Lake Utah?
mainEntity.text: Process to file workers comp claim in North Salt Lake Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Notify employer day 1 complete Form 132 request medical care file with insurer within 180 days.[8]

suggestedAnswer.text: Step-by-step for North Salt Lake: 1) Report orally/in writing 2) Get employer panel doctor 3) Submit medical bills 4) File if disputed. Insurers delay approvals—track deadlines attorney files objections prevents benefit loss.[8]

name: How to File Workers Comp Claim North Salt Lake
description: Notify employer day 1 complete Form 132 request medical care file with insurer within 180 days.[8]
